2604.13618.title: C2: Scalable Rubric-Augmented Reward Modeling from Binary Preferences
2604.13618.paper_summary: Rubric-augmented verification guides reward models with explicit evaluation criteria, yielding more reliable judgments than single-model verification. However, most existing methods require costly rubric annotations, limiting scalability. Moreover, we find that rubric generation is vulnerable to a failure of cooperation; low-quality rubrics actively mislead reward models rather than help. Inspired by the principle of cooperative communication, we propose Cooperative yet Critical reward modeling (C2), a framework that significantly improves reward model judgments by having the reward model critically collaborate with a rubric generator trained solely from binary preferences. In C2, we synthesize helpful and misleading rubric pairs by measuring how each rubric shifts the reward model toward or away from the correct preference. Using these contrastive pairs, we train a cooperative rubric generator to propose helpful rubrics, and a critical verifier to assess rubric validity before making its judgment, following only rubrics it deems helpful at inference time. C2 outperforms reasoning reward models trained on the same binary preferences, with gains of up to 6.5 points on RM-Bench and 6.0 points length-controlled win rate on AlpacaEval 2.0. Without external rubric annotations, C2 enables an 8B reward model to match performance achieved with rubrics from a 4$\times$ larger model. Overall, our work demonstrates that eliciting deliberate cooperation in rubric-augmented verification makes reward models more trustworthy in a scalable way.
2604.13618.paper_summary_zh: 增強評分標準的驗證指南使用明確的評估標準來獎勵模型，產生比單一模型驗證更可靠的判斷。<lb/>然而，大多數現有方法需要昂貴的評分標準註釋，限制了可擴展性。<lb/>此外，我們發現評分標準生成容易受到合作失敗的影響；低質量的評分標準會積極誤導獎勵模型而不是提供幫助。<lb/>受到合作通信原則的啟發，我們提出了合作但關鍵的獎勵建模（C2），這是一個框架，通過讓獎勵模型與僅根據二元偏好訓練的評分標準生成器進行關鍵合作，顯著改善獎勵模型的判斷。<lb/>在C2中，我們通過測量每個評分標準如何使獎勵模型向正確偏好移動或偏離來合成有用和誤導的評分標準對。<lb/>利用這些對比對，我們訓練了一個合作的評分標準生成器來提出有用的評分標準，以及一個關鍵的驗證器在做出判斷之前評估評分標準的有效性，僅遵循其在推理時認為有用的評分標準。<lb/>C2的表現超過了基於相同二元偏好訓練的推理獎勵模型，在RM-Bench上提高了最多6.5分，在AlpacaEval 2.0上提高了6.0分的長度控制勝率。<lb/>在沒有外部評分標準註釋的情況下，C2使一個8B的獎勵模型達到與來自4$\times$更大模型的評分標準相匹配的性能。<lb/>總的來說，我們的工作表明，在增強評分標準的驗證中引導故意合作使獎勵模型在可擴展的方式下更值得信賴。
2604.13618.author: Akira Kawabata et.al.
